base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of tileset_norfair — a tile (tile_atlas) from 1986 metroid. Norfair zone atlas — red/orange lava caves, volcanic stone, lava tiles, Chozo-pedestal red-palette variant. Volcanic underground region. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
